evidence.detail: User confirmed in-session: no sibling backend services exist for this product family (rung 2 skipped).
No explicit framework directive given; user asked to run the resolution waterfall and confirm the recommendation (rung 1 skipped).

Frontend is Flutter (pubspec.yaml: flutter sdk, drift, dio, go_router). No language adjacency to a backend exists; rung-4 frontend-adjacency default for a Flutter frontend is NestJS (strong typing + per-module isolation best fits the one-agent-one-resource fence).
